page.config:
ARCHIVE_TITLE #if appvar_mode = 0 CMDID_DB_BACKUP##STDR_READ #endif
'CFileDrive #include "50211"
'select file #include "50123"
'log event #include "50611"
'exportset_n5klient #include "50638"
class CArchiveContaier
public m_strSQLUser public m_strSQLPass public m_strArchivePass public m_strArchivePath
private sub class_initialize() m_strSQLUser = "sa" m_strSQLPass = "" m_strArchivePass = "" m_strArchivePath = init_std_path() end sub
private function init_std_path 'init_std_path = "ala ma kota" dim strArchiveRoot: strArchiveRoot = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Setup","InstallationRoot") + "Archive\"
dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK) if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 end if
#ifdef _AMPLUS dim strYear if trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME) = "navo2002" then strYear = "2009_" else strYear = "2010_" end if dim strStartFile : strStartFile = pFD.GetPath ( strArchiveRoot + strYear + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) + "\ " ) +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Hour(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Minute(Now)) + ".bak" #else dim strStartFile : strStartFile = pFD.GetPath ( strArchiveRoot + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) + "\ " ) +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Hour(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Minute(Now)) + ".bak" #endif
init_std_path = strStartFile
end function end class
function fopen() if trans_.isvar(VAR_BACKUP_DIRECTORY) then perform_auto_backup doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_QUIT" fopen = false else #ifdef _AMPLUS if trans_.isvar(VAR_EKSPORT_KLIENT_AMPLUS) then export_klient doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_QUIT" fopen = false else fopen = std_fopen() end if #else fopen = std_fopen() #endif end if
set g_pArchiveContainer = new CArchiveContaier
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_USER).value = g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLUser page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_PASS).value = g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLPass
#if appvar_mode = 0 page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PASS).value = g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePass page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PATH).value = g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath #endif end function
function perform_auto_backup() dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
dim strSQLUser : strSQLUser = "sa" if trans_.isvar(VAR_SQL_USER) then strSQLUser = cstr(trans_.var(VAR_SQL_USER)) end if
dim strSQLPwd : strSQLPwd = "" if trans_.isvar(VAR_SQL_PWD) then strSQLPwd = cstr(trans_.var(VAR_SQL_PWD)) end if
dim strBackupDestFile : strBackupDestFile = "" if trans_.isvar(VAR_BACKUP_DIRECTORY) then dim strBackupDir : strBackupDir = cstr(trans_.var(VAR_BACKUP_DIRECTORY)) if right(strBackupDir,1) <> "\" then strBackupDir = strBackupDir + "\" end if #ifdef _AMPLUS dim strYear if trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME) = "navo2002" then strYear = "2009_" else strYear = "2010_" end if strBackupDestFile = pFD.GetPath (strBackupDir + strYear + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) + "\ " ) +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Hour(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Minute(Now)) + ".ebbak" #else strBackupDestFile = pFD.GetPath (strBackupDir + trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) + "\ " ) +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Hour(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Minute(Now)) + ".ebbak" #endif else dim oArchiveContainer : set oArchiveContainer = new CArchiveContaier strBackupDestFile = oArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath end if
trans_.message 1340,0,"Rozpoczęcie automatycznej archiwizacji do pliku: " + strBackupDestFile + ", konto użytkownika SQL: " + strSQLUser
err.clear on error resume next dim bResult : bResult = doc_.backup(strSQLUser,strSQLPwd,"",strBackupDestFile) if not bResult or (err.number <> 0) then trans_.message 1343,0,"Wystąpił błąd w czasie automatycznej archiwizacji" + vbNewLine + err.description + vbNewLine else trans_.message 1341,0,"Zakończono bez błędów automatyczną archiwizację do pliku: " + strBackupDestFile log_event N5EVENTLOG_ARCHIWIZACJA, "Scieżka: " + strBackupDestFile if not trans_.saveobjects() then trans_.message 1342,0,"Nieudany zapis do rejestru zdarzeń systemowych" end if end if on error goto 0
trans_.message 1344,0,"Zakończenie automatycznej archiwizacji"
if trans_.isvar(VAR_WINRAR_PATH) then trans_.message 1345,0,"Rozpoczęcie pakowania archiwum"
dim strWinRARFullPath : strWinRARFullPath = cstr(trans_.var(VAR_WINRAR_PATH)) dim strWinRARCmd : strWinRARCmd = " a -o+ -y -ibck -afzip """ + strBackupDestFile + ".zip"" """ + strBackupDestFile + """"
trans_.message 1345,0,"Polecenie pakowania: " + strWinRARFullPath + " " + strWinRARCmd
doc_.system.execute strWinRARFullPath,".",strWinRARCmd,true,true
trans_.message 1347,0,"Zakończenie pakowania archiwum"
trans_.message 1348,0,"Usuwanie niespakowanego archiwum"
if (pFD.DeleteFile(strBackupDestFile)) then trans_.message 1349,0,"Niespakowane archiwum usunięte" else trans_.message 1350,0,"Nie udało się usunąć niespakowanego archiwum" end if end if
end function '------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dim g_pArchiveContainer
function select_new_file() dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 exit function end if
dim strStartPath : strStartPath = g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath
dim strStartFile : strStartFile = pFD.GetFileName( strStartPath ) strStartPath = pFD.GetPath( strStartPath )
dim strFolderName strFolderName = SelectFolderNewFile(strStartPath, strStartFile)
dim strFileName strFileName=pFD.GetFileName( strFolderName )
if (pFD.GetFileExtension( strFileName )="" and strFileName<>"") then strFolderName=strFolderName+".bak" end if
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PATH).text = strFolderName g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath = strFolderName end function
'messagebox #include "50122"
function select_file() dim strFilePath strFilePath = SelectFile(doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Setup","InstallationRoot") + "Archive\", "*.*", "") g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath = strFilePath page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PATH).text = strFilePath end function
function on_create_restore
dim result dim perf with g_pArchiveContainer .m_strSQLUser = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_USER).value .m_strSQLPass = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_PASS).value
.m_strArchivePass = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PASS).value .m_strArchivePath = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PATH).value
set perf = doc_.performing("Trwa odtwarzanie archiwum") err.clear on error resume next result = doc_.restore ( g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLUser , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLPass , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePass , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath ) if err.number <> 0 then set perf = nothing MessageBox "Wystąpił nieznany błąd w czasie odzyskiwania bazy: " + vbNewLine + err.description + vbNewLine, "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation result = false end if on error goto 0 set perf = nothing end with
if result then MessageBox "Odzyskiwanie bazy danych zakonczone powodzeniem", "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation page_.goback() else MessageBox "Odzyskiwanie bazy danych zakonczone niepowodzeniem", "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation end if end function
function on_create_backup
dim result dim perf with g_pArchiveContainer
.m_strSQLUser = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_USER).value .m_strSQLPass = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SQLSERVER_PASS).value
.m_strArchivePass = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PASS).value .m_strArchivePath = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ARCHIVE_PATH).value
set perf = doc_.performing("Trwa tworzenie archiwum")
err.clear on error resume next result = doc_.backup ( g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLUser , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strSQLPass , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePass , g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath ) if err.number <> 0 then set perf = nothing MessageBox "Wystąpił nieznany błąd w czasie archiwizacji bazy: " + vbNewLine + err.description + vbNewLine, "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation result = false end if on error goto 0 set perf = nothing end with
if result then
log_event N5EVENTLOG_ARCHIWIZACJA, "Scieżka: " + g_pArchiveContainer.m_strArchivePath if not trans_.saveobjects() then trans_.message 1002,0 , "Nie udał się zapis do rejestru zdarzeń systemowych" end if
MessageBox "Archwizacja bazy danych zakonczona powodzeniem", "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation page_.goback() else MessageBox "Archwizacja bazy danych zakonczona niepowodzeniem", "Archiwizacja", vbOkOnly, vbInformation end if end function
function export_klient 'ściezka do pliku dim strDestPath : strDestPath = "" strDestPath = trans_.var(VAR_EKSPORT_KLIENT_AMPLUS) if right(strDestPath,1) <> "\" then strDestPath = strDestPath + "\" end if 'rozpocznij ekport klientów exportset_n5klient strDestPath end function
page.body:
QXW_BEGIN(PICTURE_KONFIGURACJA)
XF_HEADER(Logowanie do serwera SQL)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Użytkownik ,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Hasło,1)
XF_HEADER(Archiwum)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Hasło,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Plik,1)
QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,80828,varFunction=ARCHIVE_FILE_FUN,)
QXW_END
XFCLOSEBUTTON_HNAME(ARCHIVE_ACTION,ARCHIVE_ACTION_NAME)
